articles.title: Back in NHL, Hart debuts for Vegas after acquittal
articles.description: Goalie Carter Hart, one of five 2018 Canada world junior hockey players acquitted of sexual assault in July, made his first NHL appearance in nearly two years Tuesday night, debuting for the Golden Knights in a 4-3 shootout victory over the Blackhawks.

articles.title: NHL to teams: Helmets mandatory in warmups
articles.description: The NHL is warning teams against taking warmups without helmets, a growing trend this season that violates NHL rules.

articles.title: Don’t expect the Sabres to trade Thompson, Dahlin any time soon
articles.description: The Buffalo Sabres are the owners of the longest playoff drought in the NHL by quite a distance, as they have not appeared in the Stanley Cup Playoffs since 2011. So far this season, the Sabres are 11-11-4, good enough to have them in the picture in a tightly-packed Eastern Conference, but still leaving them […]

articles.title: Surprise: great players rarely make great NHL coaches
